message:
fix: move pin icon inside model chip pill (#122)

Pin icon was rendered outside the model pill, inconsistent with the
CLI chip which already has the pin inside. Now modelChip() accepts a
pinned parameter and renders the 📌 inside the chip span, matching
cliChip() behavior.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
